title: Create /onboarding/role page (two role cards)
description: Create onboarding-role.html. This is the first page after email verification. The user selects whether they are a tenant or a landlord.
acceptance_criteria: Page heading: 'What brings you to FlatFinder?'
Two clickable cards side by side (stack on mobile):
Card 1: icon + 'I'm looking for a flat' + short description
Card 2: icon + 'I'm listing a property' + short description
Cards highlight with a border on hover/focus
Selected card shows a checkmark or filled border
A 'Continue' button is initially disabled and enables after a card is selected
technical_notes: The Continue button click handler is in TASK-031.
